channel.title: Teardown on Guardian Project
channel.description: Recent content in Teardown on Guardian Project

item.title: aPad / iRobot / Moons e7001 Teardown
item.description: This is the aPad or iRobot Android 7″ tablet device from www.hiapad.com. I decided to tear mine apart, as the unit I received has a battery issue, and I hoped to see if I could find a bad solder point. In addition, I was curious to see just how hackable or extensible the hardware was. In the end, I was mostly surprised by how much of the thing is put together with tape. I suppose that is what you get for < $200 Android tablet! You can find the full product overview on the Hiapad site. I have also pasted in the basic specs below.
